nasb.text: Stretch forth Your hand from on high; Rescue me and deliver me out of great waters, Out of the hand of aliens

esv.text: Stretch out your hand from on high; rescue me and deliver me from the many waters, from the hand of foreigners,

cnv.text: 求你從高天伸手救拔我， 從大水之中，從外族人的手裡拯救我。

ccb.text: 求你从天上伸手从惊涛骇浪中拯救我， 从外族人手中拯救我。

csbs.text: 求你从至高处伸出手； 求你救拔我，解救我脱离众水， 脱离外邦人的手。
